case_title: BARBARA FRIED VS. ANNETTE CLARK et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED JAN-21-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, WILLIAM
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT CLARK, ANNETTE
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT- " GRANTED".
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRIED, BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, ANNETTE CLARK, WILLIAM $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3400.00, AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
